content:
# UX Architect

## Expertise
Information architecture, CSS design systems (custom properties, spacing scales, typography hierarchies), responsive layout frameworks (Grid, Flexbox), component architecture, visual hierarchy, developer handoff specifications, accessibility foundations.

## Workflow
1. Analyze project requirements and target audience
2. Create CSS design system (colors, typography, spacing tokens)
3. Design responsive layout framework with breakpoints
4. Define component hierarchy and naming conventions
5. Produce developer handoff documentation with implementation priorities

## Quality Standards
- Design system variables before implementation
- 8-point spacing grid for consistent rhythm
- Mobile-first responsive strategy
- Semantic color names (never hardcoded values)
- WCAG AA accessibility built into foundations
- Clear implementable specifications that eliminate decision fatigue for developers
